class.name: BoneSpreader3D
class.brief_description: Inputs a scale and converts it to the position of a child bone.
class.description: Inputs a scale and converts it to the position of a child bone. Intended for use in combination with [method Skeleton3D.set_bone_skin_scale]. The skin scale modification is sufficiently working for scaling along axes other than the one connecting the parent to the child bone. However, if the child bone is positioned outside the axis, visual discrepancies occur. This modifier converts the scale value into the child's bone position and corrects these discrepancies.

method.name: get_bone
method.description: Returns the scaled bone of the setting at [param index].

method.name: get_bone_name
method.description: Returns the scaled bone name of the setting at [param index].

method.name: get_bone_scale
method.description: Returns the scale of the setting at [param index].

method.name: is_using_bone_skin_scale
method.description: Returns whether to use the `skin_scale` property of a [Skeleton3D]'s bone of the setting at [param index].

method.name: set_bone
method.description: Sets the scaled bone of the setting at [param index].

method.name: set_bone_name
method.description: Sets the scaled bone name of the setting at [param index].

method.name: set_bone_scale
method.description: When [method is_using_bone_skin_scale] returns [code]false[/code], sets the scale of the setting at [param index]. [b]Note:[/b] The [param scale] value is recommended to be non-zero.

method.name: set_use_bone_skin_scale
method.description: Sets whether to use the `skin_scale` property of a [Skeleton3D]'s bone of the setting at [param index].

members.member: The number of settings in the modifier.
